subject: Weekly parser status
body_text:
Weekly parser status

We shipped three improvements:
1. Better thread examples
2. Safer zero-network onboarding
3. Cleaner outbound MIME docs

Area / Status
Parser fixtures / Stable
Thread examples / Expanded
Driver docs / Ready for review

Examples index: https://github.com/nonozone/MailCli/tree/main/docs/en/examples/README.md

## Weekly parser status

We shipped three improvements:

1. Better thread examples
2. Safer zero-network onboarding
3. Cleaner outbound MIME docs

| Area | Status |
| --- | --- |
| Parser fixtures | Stable |
| Thread examples | Expanded |
| Driver docs | Ready for review |

Read the [examples index](https://github.com/nonozone/MailCli/tree/main/docs/en/examples/README.md) for runnable flows.
